## §4. Prescription Drugs

| Tier | Description | Cost |
|------|-------------|------|
| Tier 1 (Generic) | $10 copay | No deductible |
| Tier 2 (Preferred Brand) | $40 copay | No deductible |

## Services Not Covered (All Plans)

9. **Services outside scope** — medical advice, diagnoses, surgical recommendations, or recommendations on whether to undergo a specific procedure or treatment.
